info.english_meaning: to set free to  leave to kill to destroy to hurt
info.hindI_arTa: mukta karanA Coq0anA mAranA pIq0A denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' hiMsAyAm ' iti kecit  ' dOrbalye SraTayet prayatnavizaye syAcCrATayet mokzaRe  yO tu SrATayati SraTatyapi ca vA RO SranTayet SranTati  sandarBe Sni vimocanArTavizaye SraTnAtyaTa SranTate SETilye.. ' (Slo. 101) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uduttamaM varuRa pASamasmadavADarmaM vi maDyamaM SraTAya' (aTarva0 783 318 469) ucCraTAya=ucCraTAna=UrDvamunmocaya pASaBedena kriyAyAmupasargaBedo'tihfdayaNgamaH uttamamUrDvaBAge sTitaM pASamucCraTAnetyAha aDoBAge sTitamavAcInamavaSraTAneti maDyamaM ca viSraTAneti
